Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Oct-18-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF ALBERT BOASBERG'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 302 PER PREEMPTORY CHALLENGE TO JUDGE BUSCH. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Trina Ayala, CSR #12964 =301/PJB

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Oct-18-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Petitioner ALBERT BOASBERG'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award

Appearances:
Mark Joseph Kenney of Severson & Werson, 677.5505, appearing for respondent and opposing party
Iain A. MacDonald of MacDonald and Associates, 362.0449, appearing for petitioner and moving party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Petitioner's Petition to confirm arbitration award is stayed to allow parties to go forward with the 2 consolidated cases (CGC-07-466182 and CPF-07-507635). Order signed in open Court. (302/DEW/AY) Judge Diane E. Wick, Reporter Maria Torreano, CSR #8600

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
